reasoning: A multiset with all counts zero is extensionally equal to the empty multiset. The external_body axiom gives all-zero counts, and extensional equality follows directly. Correct property.
Filtering by always-false means no element satisfies the filter, so the filtered multiset has length 0. Correct consequence of the axiom.
The verified lemma `filtered_size_is_one_means_only_one_such_value` explicitly ensures uniqueness of matching elements. This is a direct application — correct and expected.
In vstd, `m.contains(v)` is defined as `m.count(v) > 0`. This is definitional — no spec gap.
